description: Adds a weapon into the cargo space of a vehicle / box with given attachments / magazines. Ignores available cargo space. If the weapon class has any pre-attached items (LinkedItems), they are removed and new items, supplied via command arguments, are added.
examples:
Add five MX GL rifles, each with flashlight side attachment, a full 30 rounds magazine loaded into the gun and a full 3Rnd HE grenade magazine loaded into the grenade launcher:
<sqf>cursorObject addWeaponWithAttachmentsCargo [["arifle_MX_GL_F", "", "acc_flashlight", "", ["30Rnd_65x39_caseless_mag", 30], ["3Rnd_HE_Grenade_shell", 2], ""], 5];</sqf>

Add one MX rifle without any attachments or magazines event though the class has linked items:
<sqf>cursorObject addWeaponWithAttachmentsCargo [["arifle_MX_Holo_pointer_F", "", "", "", [], [], ""], 1];</sqf>

Add all weapons on player with attachments:
<sqf>{ cursorObject addWeaponWithAttachmentsCargo [_x, 1] } forEach weaponsItems player;</sqf>
name: addWeaponWithAttachmentsCargo

Item.desc: container to add the weapon to. Might be a backpack, ammobox or vehicle.
Item.name: container

ArraySized.desc: Muzzle attachment class name. Use "" if not needed.
ArraySized.name: muzzle

ArraySized.desc: Side rail attachment class name. Use "" if not needed.
ArraySized.name: flashlight

ArraySized.desc: Top rail attachment class name. Use "" if not needed.
ArraySized.name: optics

ArraySized.desc: Ammo count in magazine (will be clipped to values between 0 and the maximum capacity of the magazine class)
ArraySized.name: primaryAmmoCount

ArraySized.desc: Ammo count in magazine (will be clipped to values between 0 and the maximum capacity of the magazine class)
ArraySized.name: secondaryAmmoCount

ArraySized.desc: Underbarrel rail attachment class name. Use "" if not needed.
ArraySized.name: bipod
